b0_remaining_defects.summary: B0 remains connected and relation-complete, but it retains high surplus, composition dominance, relation/pattern imbalance, and a sparse entity/triple profile.

later_tests.proved: Deletion can improve allocation balance in the tested stress endpoint, but connectivity collapses.
Strict allocated replacement did not find useful balance-improving replacements in the bounded frozen target space.
Observed unallocated auxiliary edges can preserve full connectivity while enabling limited surplus canonical bridge-edge removal.
later_tests.did_not_prove: Auxiliary edges solve the global connectedness-vs-balance tradeoff or produce a canonical allocation-faithful graph.

later_tests.proved: The bounded frozen H3 audit found zero synthetic pattern-derived bridge alternatives.
later_tests.did_not_prove: All synthetic pattern-derived methods fail under broader source scopes or alternate target spaces.

not_proven_by_later_tests: no better multi-objective construction method exists
capped or bounded tests prove full-space impossibility
B0 is the best possible graph under any future candidate source or algorithm
safe_claims: B0 is the current frozen connected baseline.
B0 is usable for downstream evaluation only if limitations are explicitly reported.
B0 does not solve the balance objective.
C4, C5-H2, and H3 provide bounded negative or diagnostic evidence, not impossibility proofs.
Full end-to-end reproducibility remains incomplete where live WDQS, LLM, or exact dashboard export sessions are missing.
unsafe_claims: B0 solves the KG construction problem.
Capped or bounded tests prove impossibility.
C5-H2 or H3 exhausts the full candidate space.
Auxiliary unallocated edges are canonical allocated triples.
Synthetic pattern-derived triples are Wikidata facts without separate observation or verification.

decision_options.name: continue_with_B0_as_evaluation_baseline
decision_options.description: Use B0 for downstream evaluation while explicitly reporting its balance and sparsity limitations.

decision_options.name: continue_graph_construction_research
decision_options.description: Create new hypotheses beyond the bounded C4, C5-H2, and H3 branches.

decision_options.name: run_downstream_KGE_evaluation_on_B0
decision_options.description: Proceed with B0 as the connected baseline and include endpoint limitations in the evaluation framing.

decision_options.name: design_new_multi_objective_construction_method
decision_options.description: Prioritize a new method that jointly optimizes connectivity, relation coverage, pattern balance, surplus/deficit, and provenance.

preferred_paths: thesis integration with B0 as a limited connected baseline
new multi-objective construction plan if final KG quality remains the priority

patch_implications.safer_framing: B0 remains the frozen connected reference baseline, but it is provisional and not a final balanced solution.
